description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build pwsafe with CMake on macOS that runs on every push to the master branch and on pull requests to master. Use a single macos-latest job that checks out the repository, builds yubikey-personalization from a specific commit, caches and builds wxWidgets if necessary, generates Xcode configs, creates an Xcode project with CMake, builds pwsafe, installs language files, creates a dmg, and uploads it as an artifact.
